title: RESPECT THE SPACE
description: This is a sanctuary for music and freedom. Treat the venue, the gear, and the people around you with care.

title: NO JUDGMENT, NO EGO
description: Leave your attitude at the door. We move as one. Everyone is equal on the dancefloor.

title: CONSENT IS KEY
description: Always respect personal boundaries. No means no in every form.

title: RAVE SAFE
description: Take care of yourself and others. If someone looks unwell, check in. We look out for each other here.

title: NO PHONES ON THE DANCEFLOOR
description: Be present. Feel the moment. The only light that belongs here is the strobe.

title: RESPECT THE MUSIC
description: Trust the DJs and the flow. Every track has a purpose. Let the sound guide you.

title: KEEP IT UNDERGROUND
description: This is not about fame or followers. It is about raw sound, energy, and connection.

title: NO HATE, NO DISCRIMINATION
description: Zero tolerance for racism, sexism, homophobia, or any form of disrespect. This space is for everyone.

title: LOSE YOURSELF, NOT YOUR MIND
description: Dance hard, rave harder, but know your limits. Your safety and energy matter.

title: LEAVE ONLY VIBES
description: Take your memories, not your trash. Respect the space and the people who build it.
